reviews.text: Jacie is such an incredible photographer and so much more. She is great at giving directions even to people who have never been photographed before. She captures the cute little moments that people dream about! We had an engagement photoshoot with her and couldn't be happier with the outcome. She has a beautiful editing style as well that is to DIE for! We can't wait to have her photograph our wedding in a few months! Book her ASAP for your wedding before she books up... because she will!! You will NOT regret it!

JACIE IS THE WORLD’S GREATEST. No, really. She captured our engagement and wedding and we are absolutely blown away. Beyond her photography skills she was a pro at making us feel comfortable and being a true partner to us throughout the whole process. There were many times I turned to her instead of our wedding planners (direction, timeline for day of, etc). Couldn’t have done it without her ❤️ ❤️ ❤️

Jacie was awesome!!! My fiancee and I really enjoyed our session. She is super professional, fun, flexible, and talented. We really appreciated how well she worked with our 2 year old and the patience she had with him (even when all he wanted to do was run around). The photos are beautiful and we decided to buy all of then cause it was way too hard to choose only 14.  We look forward to working with Jacie again for our wedding!!!

We had the absolute best experience with Jacie as our wedding photographer! From our engagement session to our entire wedding weekend, she went above and beyond to capture the most beautiful and meaningful moments. Her creativity, professionalism, and attention to detail made us feel so at ease, and the results were nothing short of stunning.

Jacie truly cares about her clients—not just as customers, but as people—which made the whole experience even more special. She took the time to understand our vision and made sure every shot reflected the love and joy of our day. Beyond being an incredible photographer, she has become a lifelong friend, and we are so grateful to have had her by our side during such an important time.

If you’re looking for a talented, passionate, and dedicated photographer, look no further than Jacie. We cannot recommend her enough!

Jacie captured both our engagement and wedding photos and I'd be lying if I said each photograph isn't one of the most stunning things I've ever seen! Jacie did a fabulous job of capturing all of the moments on our wedding day, big and small, and keeping things fun while doing it. She's truly a joy to be around and makes you feel comfortable right from the start! Your wedding photos are one of the only things that will live on after the day happens - if you want them to be stunning, Jacie is your gal!
